CustomField.description: Used by the Household Naming Service. When a naming field is selected here (Name, Formal Greeting, or Informal Greeting), NPPatch will not overwrite that field during automatic household name updates, allowing manual overrides to persist.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select which household naming fields should keep their manually entered values instead of being auto-generated.
CustomField.label: _SYSTEM: CUSTOM NAMING
